inputs.label: Filter Order (n)
inputs.businessContext: Order of the Bessel filter (integer >= 1). Higher order gives steeper roll-off.

businessContext_i18n.en: Order of the Bessel filter (integer >= 1). Higher order gives steeper roll-off.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bessel filtresinin derecesi (tam sayı >= 1). Yüksek derece daha dik geçiş sağlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ordnung des Bessel-Filters (ganze Zahl >= 1). Höhere Ordnung ergibt steileren Abfall.

inputs.label: Cutoff Frequency (fc)
inputs.businessContext: The -3 dB cutoff frequency of the filter in Hz.

businessContext_i18n.en: The -3 dB cutoff frequency of the filter in Hz.

inputs.label: Sampling Frequency (fs)
inputs.businessContext: Sampling frequency for digital implementation (must be > 2*fc).

businessContext_i18n.en: Sampling frequency for digital implementation (must be > 2*fc).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dijital uygulama için örnekleme frekansı (2*fc'den büyük olmalıdır).
businessContext_i18n.de: Abtastfrequenz für die digitale Implementierung (muss > 2*fc sein).

inputs.label: Frequency Point (f)
inputs.businessContext: Frequency at which to evaluate the filter response.

businessContext_i18n.en: Frequency at which to evaluate the filter response.
businessContext_i18n.de: Frequenz, bei der die Filterantwort ausgewertet wird.

formulas.besselPolynomial: order === 1 ? 1 + normalizedFrequency : order === 2 ? 3 + 3*normalizedFrequency + normalizedFrequency**2 : order === 3 ? 15 + 15*normalizedFrequency + 6*normalizedFrequency**2 + normalizedFrequency**3 : 105 + 105*normalizedFrequency + 45*normalizedFrequency**2 + 10*normalizedFrequency**3 + normalizedFrequency**4

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
